title: Abu Dhabi driver jailed, fined Dh70,000 after dangerous road swerving caught on camera
summary_full: An Abu Dhabi court has sentenced a reckless driver to six months in jail and a Dh70,000 fine for endangering lives with dangerous road maneuvers. His license is suspended for a year post-release. Authorities are reiterating a zero-tolerance policy, emphasizing that such actions are criminal offenses with severe consequences, including imprisonment and hefty penalties, to ensure public safety.
